description: Per-RGW daemon request rate, throughput, and latency metrics via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Discovers RGW daemons from ceph_rgw_metadata. Returns 0 instances when RGW is not deployed (ODF without CephObjectStore). Latency computed from rate-of-sum / rate-of-count, converted to ms.
name: ODF_Ceph_RGW_Performance
